privacy.body:
This privacy policy is a general template and should be reviewed for your business.

What we collect
- Information you send us (for example, your name, phone number, ZIP code, and request details).
- Basic website analytics to understand site performance.

How we use it
- To respond to your request and provide service.
- To improve this website.

We do not sell your personal information.

Contact
If you have questions, contact us using the information on this site.

terms.body:
These terms are a general template and should be reviewed for your business.

Using this website
- Do not misuse the site or attempt to disrupt it.
- Information on this site is provided for general guidance and may change.

Service information
- Scheduling and availability are confirmed when you contact us.
- Pricing depends on scope and will be confirmed before work begins.

Contact
If you have questions, contact us using the information on this site.
